form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths at Geelong. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Shapes well here on best and gets chance to atone.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Shepparton (22.95) in a Grade 5, finishing a 11 length seventh. Goes well out of this box with a win and 10 minors. Can feature with the right run.
